name: Platinum Customer
definition: A customer in the platinum segment, the top commercial tier.

name: Strategic Account
definition: A platinum customer flagged strategic by account management.

name: High-Risk Supplier
definition: A supplier whose procurement risk score meets or exceeds the supplier risk threshold.

name: Risky Customer
definition: A customer more than 60 days late on payments for each of their last 3 invoices.

name: Unreconciled Revenue
definition: Recognized revenue not yet reconciled; material when it exceeds the materiality threshold per business unit.
